title: Valentine's Day Gift Guide | #shorts
full_text: Hello, namaste. Auntie Zana here. You know what is coming up? Valentine's Day and all this news people and TV people are going to tell you, BUY THE CHOCOLATES, BUY THE WINE, buy the thing, buy all this bad, BAD BAD THINGS. DON'T DON'T DON'T. YOU DON'T NEED TO GIVE anybody the diabetes. No, I will tell you Auntie Za's guide to good Valentine's Day gifting. Number one, my first and best tip. Bounty, bounty, bounty, bounty. Every woman anywhere loves the bounty. A quicker picker upper. Okay, I know what you're thinking. Big size, not so big. I want something small, something delicate. I have something for you. Floss. Floss. Floss. Floss. Floss. She needs to floss. He needs to floss. The kids need to floss. You really love her. Buy the fancy kind of floss. You know where they hold the string for you. Okay, I know what is happening here. You guys are saying, "But Auntie Z, we want something sexy, something romantic, something we can touch and feel and use with each other." You think I don't have you? I GOT YOU COVERED ONCE MORE FOR BABY. You want to know what I got last year? So great. I got a metro card. It was fully loaded. $22. I could use anytime. I was so happy.
